item.title: Genesis
item.description: I have been attempting to write for over a year. Lets see if it sticks The website has a simple stack underneath powered by hugo base. Didn’t want to fiddle to much otherwise you wouldn’t be reading this. It is hosted on github as a simple static website. I might consider adding a domain but only when I have reached 5 posts. Another thing I might add is a newsletter subscribe option but again I don’t need the pressure yet.
